name: anti_cooccurrence

payload.prompt_template: Look only at what is literally visible in this image. Ignore what objects are typically found together; the presence of related or commonly co-occurring items is not evidence. {prompt}

summary: [mcnemar + e-value (paired binary)] effect=+0.1000 (B>A) CI=-0.0250..+0.2250, e=1.02 -> inconclusive [partial, coverage=100%]
